violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Various cut fruits were observed held at 44-46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product moved to another unit. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Inspector observed desserts, located in reach-in freezer, uncovered and unprotected from contamination. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Drinks were observed stored on the floor in the retail area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Ambient of refrigerator (produce, tortillas) was at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC took unit out of service and moved produce to another refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by chemical storage. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
Observed no hot water at the hand wash sink located in the employee restroom. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in basement. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/24/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2024
